en: akin to the base of G43 (ἀγκάλη)); to be greatly afflicted, i.e. (figuratively) indignant
kjv: be much (sore) displeased, have (be moved with, with) indignation

en: to love (in a social or moral sense)
properly, to be a courier, i.e. (by implication) to press into public service
compare G34 (ἀγέλη)) (to bring tidings); a messenger; especially an "angel"; by implication, a pastor
sacred (physically, pure, morally blameless or religious, ceremonially, consecrated)
not to know (through lack of information or intelligence); by implication, to ignore (through disinclination)
kjv: (be) ignorant(-ly), not know, not understand, unknown

en: probably akin to G1453 (ἐγείρω)); properly, the town-square (as a place of public resort); by implication, a market or thoroughfare
properly, to go to market, i.e. (by implication) to purchase; specially, to redeem
wild (as pertaining to the country), literally (natural) or figuratively (fierce)
a field (as a drive for cattle); genitive case, the country; specially, a farm, i.e. hamlet
kjv: country, farm, piece of ground, land

en: to be sleepless, i.e. keep awake
properly, to lead; by implication, to bring, drive, (reflexively) go, (specially) pass (time), or (figuratively) induce
kjv: be, bring (forth), carry, (let) go, keep, lead away, be open

en: a brother (literally or figuratively) near or remote (much like G1 (Α))

kjv: be full of heaviness, be very heavy

en: unable, i.e. weak (literally or figuratively); passively, impossible
kjv: could not do, impossible, impotent, not possible, weak

en: unleavened, i.e. (figuratively) uncorrupted; (in the neutral plural) specially (by implication) the Passover week
to set aside, i.e. (by implication) to disesteem, neutralize or violate
kjv: cast off, despise, disannul, frustrate, bring to nought, reject

en: blood, literally (of men or animals), figuratively (the juice of grapes) or specially (the atoning blood of Christ); by implication, bloodshed, also kindred

to lift up; by implication, to take up or away; figuratively, to raise (the voice), keep in suspense (the mind), specially, to sail away (i.e. weigh anchor); by Hebraism (compare H05375) to expiate sin
kjv: away with, bear (up), carry, lift up, loose, make to doubt, put away, remove, take (away, up)
ask, beg, call for, crave, desire, require

en: a cause (as if asked for), i.e. (logical) reason (motive, matter), (legal) crime (alleged or proved)
properly, an age; by extension, perpetuity (also past); by implication, the world; specially (Jewish) a Messianic period (present or future)
kjv: age, course, eternal, (for) ever(-more), (n-)ever, (beginning of the , while the) world (began, without end)

en: perpetual (also used of past time, or past and future as well)
hearing (the act, the sense or the thing heard)
kjv: audience, ear, fame, which ye heard, hearing, preached, report, rumor

en: properly, to be in the same way with, i.e. to accompany (specially, as a disciple)

kjv: give (in the) audience (of), come (to the ears), (shall) hear(-er, -ken), be noised, be reported, understand

en: a locust (as pointed, or as lighting on the top of vegetation)

kjv: one end… other, tip, top, uttermost participle

en: properly, an "alabaster" box, i.e. (by extension) a perfume vase (of any material)
to vociferate, i.e. (by implication) to wail; figuratively, to clang
man-defender; Alexander, the name of three Israelites and one other man

kjv: indeed, surely, of a surety, truly, of a (in) truth, verily, very

en: a sailor (as engaged on the salt water), i.e. (by implication) a fisher
properly, other things, i.e. (adverbially) contrariwise (in many relations)
kjv: and, but (even), howbeit, indeed, nay, nevertheless, no, notwithstanding, save, therefore, yea, yet
each other, mutual, one another, (the other), (them-, your-)selves, (selves) together (sometimes with G3326 (μετά) or G4314 (πρός))

en: properly, firm, i.e. (figuratively) trustworthy; adverbially, surely (often as interjection, so be it)
a vine (as coiling about a support)
properly, up; but (by extension) used (distributively) severally, or (locally) at (etc.)
kjv: and, apiece, by, each, every (man), in, through
arise, ascend (up), climb (go, grow, rise, spring) up, come (up)

en: to look up; by implication, to recover sight
to know again, i.e. (by extension) to read
to declare or vow under penalty of execration
kjv: (bind under a) curse, bind with an oath

en: to recline (as a corpse or at a meal)
kjv: guest, lean, lie, sit (down, at meat), at the table
call to mind, (bring to , call to, put in), remember(-brance)

en: (reflexively) to repose (literally or figuratively (be exempt), remain); by implication, to refresh
to fall back, i.e. lie down, lean back
